---
name: 🚨 Report a Gap
description: Report a new ticket inspection gap or weak point you've discovered
title: "[NEW] Gap at [Station Name]"
labels: ["gap-report", "needs-verification"]
---

## 📍 Location Information

**Station Name (Greek):**
<!-- e.g., Σύνταγμα -->

**Station Name (English):**
<!-- e.g., Syntagma -->

**Which line(s) does this affect?**
- [ ] M1 (Red Line)
- [ ] M2 (Red Line)
- [ ] M3 (Blue Line)
- [ ] TRAM
- [ ] BUS
- [ ] ISAP
- [ ] PROAST
- [ ] Other: ___________

---

## 🔍 Gap Details

**What type of gap is this?**
- [ ] **Elevator** — Unsupervised elevator or stairs bypass
- [ ] **Alternative Route** — Alternate entry/exit without inspection
- [ ] **Exit Only** — Gate/exit that allows entry
- [ ] **Fare-Free Area** — Zone without fare gates
- [ ] **Unstaffed Period** — Gap exists during certain hours/days
- [ ] **Other** — Please describe: ___________

**Brief Title:**
<!-- One sentence summary, e.g., "North exit bypass via elevator at Omonia" -->

**Detailed Description:**
<!-- Explain the gap clearly:
- Where exactly is it? (Which entrance, exit, corridor?)
- How does someone exploit it?
- What makes it a security gap?
-->

---

## 🔐 Security Details

**Severity Level:**
- [ ] **HIGH** — Major bypass, frequently exploited
- [ ] **MEDIUM** — Moderate gap, occasional risk
- [ ] **LOW** — Minor gap, rare exploitation

**Cameras Present?**
- [ ] Yes, cameras visible
- [ ] No cameras
- [ ] Unclear/Unknown

**Staff Presence:**
- [ ] Always staffed
- [ ] Sometimes staffed (peak/off-peak hours)
- [ ] Rarely staffed
- [ ] Never staffed
- [ ] Unknown

**Time Sensitivity:**
<!-- Is this gap only present at certain times?
e.g., "Only after 10 PM when staff leaves", "Weekends only", "24/7" -->

---

## 📸 Evidence (Optional)

**Do you have photos or video?**
- [ ] Yes, I can provide
- [ ] No

<!-- If yes, you can drag and drop images here or provide a link -->

**Last Observed:**
<!-- Date you last verified this gap exists, e.g., June 1, 2026 -->

---

## ⚠️ Ethics Confirmation

By submitting this, you confirm:
- [ ] I am reporting this **for security improvement purposes only**
- [ ] I understand this data will be **public**
- [ ] I am **not encouraging anyone to exploit** this gap
- [ ] This information is accurate to the **best of my knowledge**

---
